_publications._publicationTitle: Comparing 3D imaging devices for the measurement of cutaneous neurofibromas in patients with Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: Cherry Imaging required the longest time for image acquisition (0.5–2 min) and 3D model generation (1.0–6.5 min)... Cherry Imaging was the most expensive system (∼$34 000)
details: Required longest image acquisition time (0.5-2 min) and 3D model generation time (1.0-6.5 min), with highest hardware cost (~$34,000) and cumulative total time of ~6.5 min
